message:
fix(connectors): improve Matrix test crypto verification, Sonos timeout handling, and self-check assertions

Matrix connector test harness:
- Add chrono and fcp-crypto dev-dependencies for real token generation
- Implement test_signing_key() and test_token_for_key() helpers that
  produce Ed25519-signed capability tokens with zone z:work and 1-hour
  validity, replacing dummy bytes with real key pairs
- Refactor configure_and_handshake and sync_invoke_request helpers to
  accept signing keys and use properly signed tokens
- Fix missing const on auth_mode_label(), add clippy annotation

Sonos connector:
- Add HTTP 408 (Request Timeout) to retryable status codes
- Refactor AsyncError::Timeout to map to HTTP 408 instead of generic 0
- Expand is_retryable() with explicit runtime evaluation for HTTP and
  API error categories
- Add tests verifying timeout→408 mapping and retryable classification

Self-check status corrections:
- postgresql, redis, whisper: Fix test assertions from "unconfigured"
  to "degraded" to match actual connector behavior when not configured

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -38,4 +38,6 @@ uuid.workspace = true
 base64.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+chrono.workspace = true
+fcp-crypto = { path = "../../crates/fcp-crypto" }
 wiremock.workspace = true
